title: Fund Trims Simmons First National by $13 Million as Shares Lag the S&P 500
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Rhino Investment Partners reduced its stake in Simmons First National Corporation by 642,196 shares (worth $12.82 million) in Q1 2026, cutting its position from 7.3% to 4% of AUM. Despite underperforming the S&P 500 over the past year, Simmons showed improving fundamentals including 10% annualized loan growth, expanding net interest margins, and net income more than doubling year-over-year.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mixed signals: negative on relative performance (underperforming S&P 500 by 14% over past year) and fund reduction by major investor, but positive on improving operational metrics (10% loan growth, expanding margins, doubled net income). The fund's retention of a 4% stake suggests continued confidence despite the trim.

title: Simmons First National Corporation Declares $0.215 Per Share Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Simmons First National Corporation (NASDAQ:SFNC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.215 per share, payable July 1, 2026, representing a 1% increase from the prior year. The company marks its 117th consecutive year of dividend payments and 15th consecutive year of dividend increases, earning it Dividend Contender status.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated financial strength and shareholder commitment through a 1% dividend increase, marking 15 consecutive years of dividend growth and 117 consecutive years of dividend payments. This consistency and growth trajectory, combined with recognition as a Dividend Contender among only 322 companies, indicates strong financial health and management confidence in future performance.

title: Simmons First National Corporation Declares $0.215 Per Share Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Simmons First National Corporation (NASDAQ:SFNC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.215 per share, payable April 1, 2026, representing a 1% increase from the prior year. The company marks its 117th consecutive year of dividend payments with an annualized rate of $0.86 for 2026, achieving a 15th consecutive year of dividend increases and earning Dividend Contender status.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated financial strength and shareholder commitment through a 1% dividend increase, marking the 15th consecutive year of increases. The 117-year dividend payment history and recognition as a Dividend Contender among only 322 companies nationally indicate stability, profitability, and consistent capital allocation to shareholders.

title: Simmons First National Corporation Declares $0.2125 Per Share Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Simmons First National Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.2125 per share, representing a 1% increase from the previous year. The company has paid dividends for over 100 consecutive years and is one of only 26 U.S. publicly traded companies to achieve this milestone.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company has a long history of paying consistent dividends, including a 1% increase in the latest dividend. This demonstrates financial stability and a commitment to shareholder returns.

title: Simmons First National Corporation Declares $0.2125 Per Share Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Simmons First National Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.2125 per share, payable on April 1, 2025. This marks the 116th consecutive year that the company has paid cash dividends to its shareholders.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company has consistently paid cash dividends to its shareholders for 116 consecutive years, which is a strong indicator of financial stability and shareholder-friendly policies.
